title: VerdeandoApp
summary: Mobile app focused on plant care and sustainable habits with guided user journeys.
summaryEs: Aplicacion mobile enfocada en cuidado de plantas y habitos sostenibles con recorridos guiados.
problem: People interested in sustainability often need practical, daily guidance and quick access to trusted information.
problemEs: Las personas interesadas en sostenibilidad necesitan guia practica diaria y acceso rapido a informacion confiable.
solution: I built a mobile-first experience that centralizes plant care tips, educational content and progress tracking.
solutionEs: Construí una experiencia mobile-first que centraliza consejos de cuidado, contenido educativo y seguimiento de progreso.
challenges: Designing a clear onboarding flow for non-technical users
Keeping mobile performance consistent on low-end devices
Synchronizing app data with backend services
challengesEs: Disenar un onboarding claro para usuarios no tecnicos
Mantener rendimiento estable en dispositivos de gama baja
Sincronizar los datos de la app con servicios backend
featuresEs: Perfiles de plantas y recomendaciones de cuidado
UX orientada a progreso y recordatorios
architecture: React Native client consuming API endpoints, with modular features for onboarding, catalog and tracking.
architectureEs: Cliente React Native consumiendo endpoints API, con modulos para onboarding, catalogo y seguimiento.
